---
title: "Anders Birk Sørensen"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/absoerensen/

---


This is just a short

## Experience

Netcompany | Senior Architect | January 2023 - present
Netcompany | Consultant | April 2021 - December 2022
FGH | Lektor | August 2018 - July 2019
FGH | Adjunkt | August 2012 - July 2018

## Education

Aalborg University | September 2009 - August 2011
M.Sc, physics

Aalborg University | September 2006 - June 2009
B.Sc, physics and mathematics
